overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing a character walking along snowy cliff edges in a mountainous winter environment. The scene transitions from a clear view of a canyon river to heavy fog conditions, with the character's fur-lined gloves visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy cliff edge overlooking misty canyon river

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the snowy cliff edge overlooking the canyon river below

entered.detail: snow-covered rocky ledge forming the left boundary of the path
steep gray rock face forming the right side of the canyon
misty river visible at the bottom of the deep canyon
leafless tree trunk visible on the opposite canyon wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a snowy canyon edge. The camera moves forward along the cliff overlooking a misty river far below, with snow-covered rock formations on the left and steep canyon walls on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy cliff path with waterfall edge and forest backdrop

events.description: character's fur-lined gloves become visible at bottom of frame indicating first-person perspective

agents.ego_description: continuing along the cliff edge with fur-lined gloves visible, moving past a waterfall and ascending to view the forest landscape

entered.detail: water cascading over the cliff edge into the canyon below
snow-covered mountain slopes with scattered evergreen trees
tall pine trees silhouetted against the foggy sky

segments.scene_description: As the character moves forward, fur-lined gloves become visible at the bottom of the frame. The path follows the edge of a waterfall before rising to reveal a snowy forest landscape with scattered pine trees in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain plateau with increasing fog

events.description: fog and snowfall density increase significantly reducing visibility of distant trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the open snowy plateau as fog begins to obscure the forest backdrop

segments.scene_description: The character moves across an open snowy plateau surrounded by pine trees. Around the 22-second mark, fog density increases significantly, causing the forest backdrop to fade into the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy cliff edge in heavy blizzard whiteout

events.description: visibility drops to near whiteout conditions with heavy snow and dense fog

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating along the cliff edge through dense blizzard conditions with extremely limited visibility

segments.scene_description: The final segment is dominated by heavy blizzard conditions with near whiteout visibility. The character continues along the cliff edge, with only the immediate snowy ground and cliff edge visible through the dense fog and falling snow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy cliffside that transforms from a clear mountain vista into a blinding whiteout. It begins by gliding along a canyon edge overlooking a misty river, flanked by snow-covered rock formations and steep walls. As the camera moves forward, fur-lined gloves appear in the frame while the path skirts a waterfall and rises to reveal a wide, snowy forest landscape dotted with pine trees. The scene then shifts across an open plateau where the visibility gradually diminishes as fog density increases, causing the distant forest to fade into a gray haze. Finally, the environment dissolves into a heavy blizzard with near whiteout conditions, leaving only the immediate snowy ground and the cliff edge visible through the dense falling snow.
